description: Multi-brand registry. Every n8n workflow MUST accept brand_id (single brand, 'all', or list). NO workflow may hardcode Bakudan-only logic.
notes: All workflows must support brand_id='all' (run across every active brand).
location_id may be 'all' (every location of the brand) or a specific location key.
Adding a new brand: append to 'brands' array — no code changes needed for workflows that read this file.
